steps: map sections from raw data to virtual addresses
walk IAT to resolve imports via LoadLibraryA + GetProcAddress
find DllMain in export table by name

description: Reflective DLL injection with manual PE loading. AES-128 encrypted DLL stub (key: 'Rfl3ct!v3_DLL_k3'). Parses PE headers manually (DOS signature, e_lfanew, NT signature), maps sections, fixes base relocations for IMAGE_REL_BASED_DIR64 entries, resolves imports by walking the IAT and calling LoadLibraryA/GetProcAddress for each module, locates DllMain in the export table, and invokes it with DLL_PROCESS_ATTACH. Anti-debug via direct PEB.BeingDebugged check. Synthetic/safe — loads a harmless 32-byte DLL stub.
